description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in rural or workwear attire, featuring a wide-brimmed hat, a checkered long-sleeve shirt, and blue overalls. The overalls are visibly worn and stained, suggesting manual labor or outdoor work. The figure has a mustache and is wearing tall black boots, suitable for muddy or rugged environments. The arms are extended horizontally, and the body posture is upright and sturdy. The clothing is loose-fitting, with the overalls covering most of the torso and legs, and the shirt sleeves extending to the wrists. The overall appearance is that of a traditional farmer or laborer, commonly seen in rural or agricultural urban fringe settings.
description: A male adult in a wide-brimmed hat, checkered shirt, blue overalls, and tall boots, with a mustache and a rugged, work-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, mustache, hat, checkered shirt, blue overalls, and boots with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, nose, mustache, and the protruding belly under the overalls.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, overalls with visible stains, and the back of the boots and shirt.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile, arm, and the shape of the overalls and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: wide-brimmed hat, long-sleeve checkered shirt, work overalls, tall work boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by hat
